diagrams.caption: LLM Processing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Horizontal pipeline with four rectangular boxes connected by arrows. Box 1: 'Raw Text' contains 'Hello world!'. Arrow labeled 'TOKENIZE'. Box 2: 'Tokens' contains '[15496, 1917, 0]'. Arrow labeled 'EMBED'. Box 3: 'Vectors' contains grid of numbers. Arrow labeled 'ATTEND'. Box 4: 'Attention Output' contains modified grid. Arrow labeled 'SAMPLE'. Final box: 'Generated Text' contains 'Hello world! How'. Black on white, monospace font.
